summary: Fair‑quality recording of a lively first set highlighted by a scorching Jack Straw and solid renditions of Peggy‑O and Friend of the Devil
review: The performance is praised for its relaxed vibe, energetic playing and especially the intense Jack Straw, with several reviewers noting Garcia’s full engagement. Recording quality is mixed – listeners find it generally listenable but complain about reduced crispness, occasional hiss and clipping, leading to a fair technical rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is rated around 4 (strong performances, standout songs) while recording quality is about 2.5–3 (listenable but not crisp). Weighted combination yields a ~3.6 overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Less crisp than desired, some hiss and occasional clipping; overall listenable but not high‑fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as mellow and relaxed yet builds into an intense, high‑energy performance; reviewers note good pacing and strong song transitions.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar work is highlighted as intense on Jack Straw and fully engaged throughout the set.
